name: Cloudflare
description: Access the entire Cloudflare API (DNS, Workers, R2, Zero Trust) via 2 tools
longDescription: Official Cloudflare API MCP server providing access to 2,500+ endpoints across DNS, Workers, R2, Zero Trust, and all other Cloudflare products through just two tools: search() and execute(). Uses Code Mode for token efficiency (~1K tokens vs 1M+ for native tools).
author: Cloudflare

apiKeyConfig.label: Cloudflare API Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create an API token with required permissions (Account Resources: Read for auto-detect)

examplePrompts: List all my DNS records for example.com
Search for Cloudflare API endpoints for Pages
Execute a GraphQL query against Cloudflare Analytics
